subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: governance/rights/economics rebuilt from independent sources (World Bank/IMF estimates, V-Dem, RSF, TI, Freedom House, HRW, Amnesty, UN/OHCHR, ACLED, UNODC + Irrawaddy/Frontier/Myanmar Now); the military junta's state media and official statistics EXCLUDED there.
A collapsed conflict state: a 2021 coup triggered a nationwide civil war, and the junta now controls only a minority of territory; a planned 2025-26 election is treated as a sham.

Standout drags: an active multi-front civil war, atrocity-level repression, a collapsed economy, a Rohingya-genocide legacy, and the catastrophic March-2025 earthquake. Overall: among the most negative profiles.

economic.notes: A collapsed, sanctioned war economy with a broken currency and banking system.

fiscal_state.notes: A collapsed, opaque war economy with output well below pre-coup levels, sanctioned and junta-controlled. (World Bank MEM)

monetary_independence.notes: A collapsed kyat, no credible central bank, and heavy FX controls. (World Bank; Frontier)

banking_stability.notes: Broken, cut off, sanctioned, and cash-rationed. (World Bank)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Gas, jade, and rare-earths alongside a vast illicit economy (drugs and scam-centres); sanctioned and conflict-disrupted. (UNODC; OFAC)

institutional.notes: A military dictatorship with no rule of law, no credible data, and among the worst press repression.

rule_of_law.notes: A military dictatorship with no judicial independence and atrocity impunity. (V-Dem; Freedom House)

statistical_integrity.notes: No credible state data; multilaterals estimate. (World Bank)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Collapsed and contested - the junta controls only a minority of territory. (ACLED)

press_freedom.notes: Among the world's worst - RSF near the bottom, with mass journalist imprisonment and an underground independent press. (RSF; CPJ)

political_social.notes: An active civil war, atrocity-level repression, a genocide legacy, and mass displacement.

political_stability.notes: A 2021 coup triggered a nationwide civil war; the junta has lost control of much of the country, with a sham 2025-26 election - among the world's most unstable. (ACLED; ICG)

civil_liberties.notes: Atrocity-level repression, mass killing and detention, and forced conscription. (HRW; Amnesty; OHCHR)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: A Rohingya-genocide legacy in a refugee-producing conflict state with ongoing displacement and abuse. (OHCHR; Amnesty)

social_cohesion.notes: An active multi-front civil war and ethnic fragmentation. (ACLED; ICG)

demographics.notes: War-disrupted, with millions displaced and youth fleeing or conscripted. (UN; RFA)

geopolitical.notes: A sanctioned pariah junta in the region's worst active conflict.

alliance_reliability.notes: A pariah junta propped by China and Russia and isolated from the West. (ICG; CSIS)

conflict_involvement.notes: An active civil war - the region's worst, with tens of thousands of deaths. (ACLED)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Heavily sanctioned with capital controls. (OFAC; EU)

physical_practical.notes: Catastrophic climate and seismic exposure atop a collapsed health system and infrastructure.

climate.notes: Highly climate-vulnerable (cyclones, floods) plus the catastrophic March-2025 magnitude-7.7 earthquake. (USGS; WHO)

healthcare.notes: Collapsed and war-destroyed, with disease resurgence. (UN; WHO)

infrastructure.notes: War-damaged, with an electricity collapse and quake destruction. (World Bank)

crime_safety.notes: War zones, illicit-economy violence, and scam-centre trafficking hubs. (Amnesty; ASPI)

disaster_insurance.notes: Negligible penetration against extreme seismic/cyclone exposure. (hazard context)

summary: A collapsed conflict state. A 2021 coup triggered a nationwide civil war in which the military junta has lost control of much of the country; the economy is collapsed and sanctioned with a broken currency and banking system, and a planned election is treated as a sham. Institutions offer no rule of law, no credible data, and among the world's worst press repression, atop atrocity-level violence, a Rohingya-genocide legacy, and millions displaced. The catastrophic March-2025 earthquake compounded a collapsed health system and infrastructure. This is among the most negative profiles in the dataset.
